name: Ultimate PHP Stack
postCreateCommand: apk update && apk add apache2 php83 php83-apache2 php83-sqlite3 php83-pdo_sqlite php83-mysqli php83-pdo_mysql php83-mbstring php83-gd php83-xml php83-curl php83-session php83-tokenizer sqlite mariadb mariadb-client composer github-cli bash && ln -sf /usr/bin/php83 /usr/bin/php && sed -i 's|/var/www/localhost/htdocs|/workspaces/Website/WebSite/Birds|g' /etc/apache2/httpd.conf && sed -i 's/AllowOverride None/AllowOverride All/g' /etc/apache2/httpd.conf && chmod -R 755 /workspaces/Website/WebSite/Birds && mysql_install_db --user=mysql --datadir=/var/lib/mysql && (mysqld_safe --datadir='/var/lib/mysql' & sleep 5 && mysql -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS app_db; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'admin'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'password'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON app_db.* TO 'admin'@'localhost'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;")
